# VERIFY: #192 — Create meridian:fix-it recipe
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | Plan sub-agent output -->

**Intent:** Verify that the compiled fix-it recipe satisfies all intent constraints, produces correct artifacts, and handles failure conditions gracefully.

### Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Recipe halts in pre-flight if no issue provided or issue does not exist
- [ ] Recipe halts if issue is not open
- [ ] tech-designer produces RCA with specific root cause (not symptom restatement)
- [ ] RCA output includes blast radius, affected files, dependencies, risks, and alternatives
- [ ] doc-builder generates HTML brief from RCA + design STM artifacts before checkpoint
- [ ] Checkpoint presents RCA findings, fix design, confidence, and alternatives
- [ ] Checkpoint blocks until human approves via Tether
- [ ] After Tether, no further human approvals required
- [ ] code-builder reads from STM, never from checkpoint brief
- [ ] ship invoked with approval_override: auto-proceed
- [ ] Recipe creates feature branch if not already on one
- [ ] Status file enables resume from any failed step
- [ ] Evidence artifact records full pipeline trace

### Verification Steps

| Step | Method | Expected Outcome |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| Pre-flight: no issue | Invoke fix-it with no issue number, not on feature branch | Hard halt |
| Pre-flight: closed issue | Invoke with closed issue number | Hard halt |
| Pre-flight: on main | Invoke while on main | Creates fix/ branch via repo-orchestrator |
| RCA depth eval | Check tech-designer STM artifact for root_cause field | Root cause identifies specific file/line/logic |
| Brief generation | Check briefs/ directory after doc-builder | HTML brief exists with RCA + design sections |
| Checkpoint blocks | Observe at checkpoint | Recipe pauses, waits for Tether |
| Post-checkpoint autonomy | After Tether | No further prompts; code-builder then ship run automatically |
| Context isolation | Inspect code-builder contract | Contains STM design paths, NOT brief path |
| Ship invocation | Inspect ship call | Contains approval_override: auto-proceed |
| Resume after failure | Simulate ship failure, re-invoke | Resumes from ship step |
| Evidence completeness | Read final evidence | Contains RCA trace, design, implementation, PR, merge SHA |

### Edge Cases

| Scenario | Expected Behavior |
|----------|------------------|
| Already on fix branch for the issue | Skip branch creation, proceed to RCA |
| Config-only fix (no code changes) | code-builder handles config changes per plan |
| tech-designer cannot identify root cause | Structured failure; recipe halts with "RCA inconclusive" |
| code-builder fails verification | Self-recovery (max 2 retries); if still fails, halt before shipping |
| Ship fails at merge due to conflicts | Ship halts; fix-it status records failure; user resolves and resumes |
| User responds Vanish | Recipe halts, writes rejection evidence, no implementation occurs |
| Resume after partial (RCA done, checkpoint not reached) | Status file skips to brief generation |
